title: Azure Jewelry Collection 2026 — Sky Blue Edition
title_cn: Azure Jewelry 2026 产品图册 — 天蓝编辑版
description: Complete redesign with luminous sky-blue Azure identity, editorial layouts, yellow diamond selection, dramatic red & green spreads, and stronger commercial effectiveness.
description_cn: 全新天蓝色品牌识别，编辑感版面，新增黄钻选品页，红绿钻戏剧性对开页，更强商业转化力。

title: Azure Jewelry Collection 2026 — Editorial Edition
title_cn: Azure Jewelry 2026 产品图册 — 编辑精选版
description: Editorial redesign featuring Azure blue brand signature, asymmetric layouts, white & fancy color diamonds, bespoke services, and private client information.
description_cn: 全新编辑版设计，Azure 蓝品牌标识，非对称版面，涵盖白钻、彩钻系列、专属定制服务与私人客户信息。

title: Azure Jewelry Collection 2026
description: Complete product catalog featuring white diamonds, fancy color diamonds (pink, blue, yellow, red, green), bespoke services, and private client information.
description_cn: 完整产品图册，涵盖白钻系列、彩钻系列（粉钻、蓝钻、黄钻、红钻、绿钻）、专属定制服务与私人客户信息。
